name: GPC Participacoes S.A.
summary: GPC Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S.A., through its subsidiaries, engages in the production and sale of thermosetting resins to the reconstituted wood panels industry in Brazil. It operates through Chemical and Steel Pipe segments. The company also engages in the production of formaldehyde and hexamine; and resale of methanol and other chemical products. In addition, it manufactures tubes for construction, infrastructure, and automobile markets; and produces steel tubes for oil and gas segment. The company was founded in 1929 and is headquartered in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
